prompt: Add a task for me to call the Ulta owner about the AC1 approval by Friday.

score.finalText:
Verdict: client/owner responsibility, not an internal Alleato task from this meeting.

Evidence: The source discussion says “Mechanical team working to locate kitchen exhaust vents and other equipment to avoid visibility from key sightlines” and “consultants to continue work once plans are locked.” That is coordination/work by the mechanical designer/consultant on the project, not a distinct Alleato internal to-do for a teammate named “mechanical.” It’s also a design coordination outcome from the meeting, not a clearly assigned internal action with an Alleato owner.

Recommended correction: Reclassify this as either:
- a consultant/client coordination item tied to the mechanical consultant, or
- a meeting outcome/design note, not an internal Tasks-page task.

If kept as a task, assign it to the actual project owner at Alleato who will coordinate with the mechanical consultant, with a clearer title like: “Coordinate with mechanical consultant to conceal exhaust locations in final design.”

provider_decision.reason: Streaming model tools enabled on the configured AI SDK provider. Vercel AI Gateway is preferred when AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is configured; direct OpenAI requires AI_PROVIDER_PATH=openai or no gateway key. Disable by setting AI_ASSISTANT_DISABLE_STREAMING_MODEL_TOOLS=true.
